channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-05
item.description:
Our community has seen a flurry of activity across multiple projects, with notable updates in `giladfeldman/docpluck`, `Davidvandijcke/coarse`, and `giladfeldman/escicheck`. The `docpluck` project resolved several issues, including recovering residual prose shapes and addressing an orphaned affiliation remnant, while also updating documentation and adding tests for the "rc-t" module. Meanwhile, `coarse` re-enabled Fable 5 in the model picker, and `escicheck` synchronized its `main` branch with the `escicheckapp` repository, bringing it in line with `effectcheck` version `0.6.13`. Additionally, `auto-zcurve` and `output-it-forward` saw updates, including a revised validation note with a citation and the addition of a Chrome Webstore link, respectively. These updates demonstrate the connections and progress being made across our projects, and we celebrate the hard work and dedication of our community members.

74 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

docpluck31 commits
regcheck18 commits
metacheck15 commits
escicheck6 commits
statcheck2 commits

item.title: metacheck: 11 commits today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

Work was done on the following branches: `jw_llm_fixes`, `jw_plumber_bibr_api`, `jw_bibr_read_passthrough`, `jw_grobid_text_fix`, `jw_schema_sync_10_5`, `jw_fable_fixes`, and `data_check`. The `jw_llm_fixes` branch saw a fix to correct the "ollama-native gate" using "&& not %%" and added "fail-fast param/model checks". On the `jw_plumber_bibr_api` branch, a feature was added for a "bibr-JSON REST API" with "validated uploads, HTML report, hardened runtime". The `jw_fable_fixes` branch had multiple commits, including fixes to the "code_check green path", "ref_miscitation report", and "traffic lights", as well as changes to the "plumber" endpoint pipeline and the addition of a "/modules endpoint". The `data_check` branch introduced "Transparent resource caps, LLM/download controls, data-manifest + archive tooling", as described by Lakens. Other branches, such as `jw_grobid_text_fix` and `jw_schema_sync_10_5`, addressed specific issues, including stopping "anchor normalization from corrupting paper text" and syncing the "bundled paper.json to bibr v10.5", respectively.

11 commit(s) today:

  • a73d52a [jw_llm_fixes] fix(llm): correct ollama-native gate (&& not %%); fail-fast param/model checks — Jakub Werner
  • d99956e [jw_plumber_bibr_api] feat(plumber): bibr-JSON REST API — validated uploads, HTML report, hardened runtime — Jakub Werner
  • 4daee8c [jw_bibr_read_passthrough] feat(read): let bibr abstract and figure/table captions flow through — Jakub Werner
  • 00d98b8 [jw_grobid_text_fix] fix(grobid): stop anchor normalization from corrupting paper text — Jakub Werner
  • 4d53313 [jw_schema_sync_10_5] fix(schema): sync bundled paper.json to bibr v10.5 — Jakub Werner
  • fdc5a1d [jw_fable_fixes] tests: fix test_that wrapper warnings, add expect_disjoint, env-aware .onLoad test — Jakub Werner
  • 994fb58 [jw_fable_fixes] modules: fix code_check green path, ref_miscitation report, traffic lights, stale imports — Jakub Werner
  • de6fd04 [jw_fable_fixes] core: fix GROBID text corruption, LLM crashes, API hardening — Jakub Werner
  • d91dc7e [jw_fable_fixes] read: let bibr abstract and figure/table captions flow through .read_bibr — Jakub Werner
  • 9483c49 [jw_fable_fixes] plumber: DRY endpoint pipeline, /modules endpoint, report=false, hardened Docker runtime — Jakub Werner
  • c42ecbf [data_check] Transparent resource caps, LLM/download controls, data-manifest + archive tooling — Lakens
  • 342b25c [data_check] additions — Lakens
  • bd8c890 [data_check] first version of datacheck modules — Lakens
  • 41a54be [data_check] prevent double crossref api, log errors — Lakens
  • bb7a5ee [data_check] updated ref_accuracy, validated. Minor fixes to reg_check and ref_consistency — Lakens
  • 6937e9c [data_check] Merge exact_p_zero_warning: flag p-values reported as exactly zero — Lakens
  • 3c854b3 [data_check] Rewrite OSF prereg extraction to schema-driven dispatch — Lakens
  • 32659a9 [main] Point home page text to the Metacheck Manual — Lakens
  • d6a7f12 [main] Replace Get Started/Reference/Articles navbar with Metacheck Manual link — Lakens
  • b8ac461 [data_check] Fix coi_check/funding_check cold-start failure — Lakens

View all commits →

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed from the same branch of the remote repository. The merge commit was made to integrate changes from the remote `feature-non-apa-newer` branch into the local `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. Additionally, on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, "admin updates" were made, as per the commit message. No other branches were modified in this set of commits. The changes were made by MicheleNuijten. These commits did not introduce any new features or fixes beyond the mentioned admin updates and the merge operation.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: docpluck: 3 commits today
item.description:
giladfeldman/docpluck

Work was done on the 'main' branch, where a fix was applied to recover 2 residual ×-as-3 prose shapes that W0k couldn't reach, as stated in the commit message "fix(glyph): recover 2 residual ×-as-3 prose shapes W0k can't reach (efendic) + v2.4.116". Another commit on the 'main' branch addressed the issue of an orphaned affiliation remnant in the Abstract body, with the commit message "fix(render): strip affiliation remnant orphaned in Abstract body (chandrashekar) + v2.4.115" describing the change. The 'main' branch also saw documentation updates, including a commit that "record run-3 outcome — W0l ×-as-3 residuals resolved (v2.4.116)" and another that diagnosed a "chan_feldman T3 caption-tail-walk TEXT-LOSS" issue, with an "xfail guard" added as a fix is deferred. Additionally, the documentation was updated to rescope "efendic headings to B6" as part of the triage process. The 'main' branch also saw a commit that added documentation and tests for the "rc-t" module to diagnose a specific text loss issue.

3 commit(s) today:

  • ba4e124 [main] docs+test(rc-t): diagnose chan_feldman T3 caption-tail-walk TEXT-LOSS; xfail guard (fix is corpus-wide, deferred) — Gilad Feldman
  • 56f60b5 [main] docs(triage): record run-3 outcome — W0l ×-as-3 residuals resolved (v2.4.116); efendic headings rescoped to B6 — Gilad Feldman
  • a4f8796 [main] fix(glyph): recover 2 residual ×-as-3 prose shapes W0k can't reach (efendic) + v2.4.116 — Gilad Feldman
  • e140cf1 [main] fix(render): strip affiliation remnant orphaned in Abstract body (chandrashekar) + v2.4.115 — Gilad Feldman
  • 0007f4f [main] docs(triage): record run-2 outcome — 7 fixes v2.4.108→114, efendic 5/10 resolved — Gilad Feldman
  • 6a613de [main] fix(normalize): strip Title-Case surname running header (efendic) + v2.4.114 — Gilad Feldman
  • 9093da5 [main] fix(render): strip Sage volume/issue + ©-glyph masthead (efendic) + v2.4.113 — Gilad Feldman
  • 1d666ae [main] fix(normalize): recover ×-as-3 in body prose / flattened captions (W0k) + v2.4.112 — Gilad Feldman
  • f9da0e7 [main] fix(render): demote abstract-zone Key-Points finding sentence to body (D3) + v2.4.111 — Gilad Feldman
  • f15566c [main] fix(render): demote over-promoted Results subsection to ### (C3) + v2.4.110 — Gilad Feldman
  • 848151e [main] fix(normalize): recover 2-for-minus in body PROSE (W0j) + v2.4.109 — Gilad Feldman
  • 0d34a26 [main] fix(render): rejoin wrapped Results-subsection headings into one ### (C1) + v2.4.108 — Gilad Feldman
  • 216eb10 [main] docs(handoff): 2026-07-03 iterate run — efendic RESOLVED, 7 fixes shipped, PARTIAL — Gilad Feldman
  • ff3a223 [main] docs(triage): record 2026-07-03 run outcome — efendic RESOLVED, ip_feldman C3 deferred — Gilad Feldman
  • c44d203 [main] fix(render): strip body author-affiliation footnote block (efendic) + v2.4.107 — Gilad Feldman
  • 8cad252 [main] fix(title): drop Elsevier CrossMark "T" widget from the H1 title + v2.4.106 — Gilad Feldman
  • 34585f5 [main] fix(sections): promote Sage/APA back-matter headings via taxonomy + v2.4.105 — Gilad Feldman
  • 4c0c3e9 [main] fix(glyph): stop dropped-minus recovery sign-flipping SE table cells (efendic) + v2.4.104 — Gilad Feldman
  • 4e5c3ff [main] fix(glyph): recover ×-as-3 in interaction-term table cells (efendic) + v2.4.103 — Gilad Feldman
  • 54b7923 [main] fix(glyph): recover 2-for-minus in Camelot HTML table cells (efendic B-column) + v2.4.102 — Gilad Feldman

View all commits →
